Our Credo and our purpose
top_pages.display_reason: explicit purpose language, stakeholder framing, people embedding

scoring_top_pages.title: J&J CareCommunity | Empowering nurses & health workers worldwide

purpose_examples: Read more Our Credo and our purpose September 27, 2023 8 decades of Our Credo The values that guide our decision-making are spelled out in Our Credo.
Put simply, Our Credo challenges us to put the needs and well-being of the people we serve first.

Our company | Johnson & Johnson At Johnson & Johnson, our more than 138,000 employees globally are building a world where diseases are prevented and cured and treatments are smarter and less invasive.
Every day, our more than 130,000 employees globally are building a world where complex diseases are prevented and cured, treatments are smarter and less invasive—and solutions are personal.
For 140 years, we have aimed to keep people well at every age and every stage of life.

purpose_presence.question: Does the company articulate why it exists, who it serves, and the impact it seeks to create?
purpose_presence.score_description: Purpose is explicit, stakeholder-linked, impact-oriented, and repeated across corporate materials.
